productDisplayName: Nike Men Capri II Mid White Casual Shoes
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these nike Capri II shoes are perfect for you. Designed for the super-stylish, these shoes have a great colour combination of white and grey with turquoise highlights. Featuring texture, stitch and overlay details and mid-height ankle, the nike Capri II sneakers are a great add-on to the wardrobe. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Synthetic upper for absolute durability Central lacing system for a snug, customised Fit with stylish two-tone laces Highly padded mesh tongue and collar for all-day comfort Knitted waffle pattern panels on sides for great casual style Embroidered branding on back heel and brand tab on tongue Midsole Autoclave construction midsole for enhanced cushioning EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel Outsole Solid rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for superior grip Pivot point below the big toe mound for superior traction Straight line grooves below toes and heel for traction and stability shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
